action.text: SA 4422 (the instructions of the motion to refer) fell when the motion to refer to Senate Committee on Rules and Administration the House message to accompany S. 1383 with instructions to report back forthwith with the following amendment (SA 4422) was tabled.
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Amendment SA 4422 proposed by Senator Thune. (consideration: CR S1067) To improve the bill.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4422 proposed by Senator Thune.
